character_designs.identity: Hanwubao military controller, border commander of the Suming War-Armor Office, high-ranking lower-caste combat insect

body_and_face.species_lock: Clearly non-human and non-humanoid combat insect with a semi-anthropomorphic command face; never a human general in armor and never an ordinary human face.
body_and_face.scale: Approximately 2.4 to 2.7 meters tall in-world, towering over humans while built for forward lunges.
body_and_face.build: Broad heavy chest and back carapace, forward-leaning torso, compact predatory waist, long reverse-jointed legs.
body_and_face.head: Mantis-derived triangular command head with semi-anthropomorphic military-caste structure: readable brow ridge, central nose-like chitin ridge, cheek plates, narrow jaw line, dark compound eyes placed near human eye positions, bone-white mandible guard as a military jaw-plate, and dark soft neck membrane. No sclera, iris, normal pupils, human skin, human hair, or fully human face.
body_and_face.expression: Emotion reads through brow angle, compound-eye glint, jaw-guard tension, head angle, and blade posture. The face should feel more command-readable than a rank-and-file insect soldier while staying clearly non-human.

constant_anchors: black-green hardened carapace across shoulders, chest, and back
old iron harness crossing chest and back
bone-white insect-wax seal strips over carapace seams
black short mantle attached to one shoulder and upper back
folding forearm blades stored in carapace grooves
rank markings carved into back carapace
small locked Suming/Qingming white-wing-over-black-sun plaque used only as physical rank tag

state_designs.silhouette: Tall forward-leaning combat insect at controlled stillness, blades folded into forearm grooves, old iron harness and command belt readable.
state_designs.color_logic: Black-green carapace dominates; old iron and bone-white wax provide rank and control contrast; dark red remains almost absent.
state_designs.damage_level: Disciplined military wear, small scratches and wax cracks only.
required_details: folded blade seams visible on both forearms
iron gate command token hangs from command belt
small white-wing-over-black-sun plaque must look copied from the locked emblem, not redesigned
no fully human face, human skin, human hair, boots, robes, or complete armor suit

state_designs.silhouette: Lower and wider predatory lunge, forearm blades deployed like mantis blade-limbs, reverse-jointed legs braced for a high-speed strike.
state_designs.color_logic: Black-green and old iron stay dominant; restrained dark-red blade scratches mark threat without gore.
state_designs.damage_level: Visible blade wear and small dark-red cuts, no bloody monster tableau.
required_details: blades grow from forearm structure rather than being held swords
short spear is secondary and must not replace blade-limb identity
body remains insectoid and non-human from every angle

state_designs.silhouette: Same combat insect under border-wall frost and blackstone lighting, short mantle tightened, command gear still visible through snow dust.
state_designs.color_logic: Border blackstone, snow white, and shadow blue overlay the Suming black-green and bone-white system.
state_designs.damage_level: Frost, snow dust, and old iron wear only.
required_details: must not become Grey Wall Army or Northern beastfolk
rank plaque and command token remain small but readable
reverse-jointed legs and claw feet must be visible
snow must not hide the non-human body plan

detail_panels.purpose: Lock Li Tang as a mantis-like lower-caste combat insect.
detail_panels.notes: Triangular mantis-derived command head with readable brow ridge, nose-like chitin ridge, cheek plates, narrow jaw line, dark compound eyes, and bone-white mandible guard; not a fully human face.

detail_panels.purpose: Explain the retracted and deployed blade-limb mechanism.
detail_panels.notes: Grooves, old iron hinge bands, chitin blade edge; not handheld swords.

detail_panels.purpose: Make War-Armor Office control gear distinct from human armor.
detail_panels.notes: Harness restrains and ranks the insect body; dark-green belt carries command objects.

detail_panels.purpose: Show hierarchy without redesigning the Suming/Qingming emblem.
detail_panels.notes: Small physical white-wing-over-black-sun plaque based on the locked emblem, plus carved back-carapace rank marks.
Short spear as secondary weapon; iron gate token as Hanwubao military authority object.
Long reverse-jointed lower limb, clawed foot, frost and blackstone scuffing.
Black-green carapace, old iron, bone-white insect wax, dark-green belt cloth, black short mantle, restrained dark-red blade mark, snowline blackstone.

negative_rules: human eyes with sclera or iris
